generated_oml:
instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller interfacing sensors and transmitting data"
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural component of the gantry crane"
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller unit managing crane operations"
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory research environment for the gantry crane"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure, Controller, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements from the encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylib, Grafana
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylib, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation of the crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Grafana
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for movement path computation and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architectural model for context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Grafana
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing all system-generated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for real-time monitoring and architectural diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying database, broker, and dashboard components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for crane control logic and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for managing crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for recording operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure model accuracy against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control commands for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from historical operational metrics"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights for crane status"
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on model accuracy versus physical system behavior"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization via context and container diagrams, adopting an ad-hoc approach instead of a commercial digital twin framework and utilizing containerization for deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Continuous Validation Service ensures model fidelity by comparing real-time trajectory measurements with simulated counterparts, calculating distance metrics to assess deviations. It evaluates these metrics against predefined acceptable thresholds to trigger corrective actions, thereby maintaining system accuracy and reliability through continuous validation processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is utilized for inter-service communication among digital twin components including Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service via the MQTT Broker. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "C4 Model for software architecture visualization; no other industry standards or compliance frameworks specified."
]
